tree.name: Tyrese Haliburton
tree.tradeDescription: IND traded Domantas Sabonis, Justin Holiday, Jeremy Lamb, and a 2023 2nd round pick (Jordan Walsh #38) to SAC for Tyrese Haliburton, Buddy Hield, and Tristan Thompson. Both teams received trade exceptions.

assetsGivenUp.name: Domantas Sabonis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: IND traded Paul George to OKC for Domantas Sabonis and Victor Oladipo.

assetsGivenUp.name: Paul George
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward from Fresno State, 10th overall pick in 2010 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Justin Holiday
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent in July 2019

assetsGivenUp.name: Jeremy Lamb
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from CHA in July 2019

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 2nd Round Pick (#38)
assetsGivenUp.note: IND's own pick, sent to SAC
